ActivityDiscoveryTextChunkData.description: Data payload for canonical assistant display text chunks.

finish.description: True on the final chunk; that chunk contains the complete display text and is transcript/debug truth.
finish.title: Finish

text.description: Cumulative assistant display text. Clients replace the current assistant text with this value on every chunk.
text.title: Text

ActivityDiscoveryTextChunkData.title: ActivityDiscoveryTextChunkData

BoundingBox.description:
Normalized bounding box coordinates [0-1].

Coordinates represent the box position relative to image dimensions:
- (0, 0) is top-left corner
- (1, 1) is bottom-right corner
BoundingBox.title: BoundingBox

DetectedObject.description:
Single detected object with full details.

Used in multi-object detection results where each object
has its own bounding box and attributes.

object_id.description: Index in detection order (0 = most prominent)
object_id.title: Object Id

DetectedObject.title: DetectedObject

DiagnosticInfo.description:
Diagnostic information for poor quality images.

Provides guidance to help users take better photos when
the image quality is insufficient for recognition.

can_proceed.description: Whether to proceed despite quality issues
can_proceed.title: Can Proceed

tips.description: Helpful tips to improve the photo
tips.title: Tips

DiagnosticInfo.title: DiagnosticInfo

ResponseMeta.description: Optional operational metadata shared by API transports.
ResponseMeta.title: ResponseMeta

VisionAttributes.description: Enhanced attributes extracted from image recognition.
VisionAttributes.title: VisionAttributes

VisionResult.description:
Enhanced vision recognition result with multi-object and diagnostic support.

For single object detection, use object_name, confidence, attributes directly.
For multi-object detection, use detected_objects list with is_multiple=True.
For diagnostic guidance (poor images), use diagnostic field.
The primary object fields always reflect detected_objects[primary_object_index].

detected_objects.description: All detected objects with full details
detected_objects.title: Detected Objects

detected_properties.description: Closed-vocabulary visual properties detected in the image (e.g. 'round', 'red', 'metal', 'fuzzy'). Consumed by the activity module for Tier P selection and Cat5 criterion matching.
detected_properties.title: Detected Properties

diagnostic.description: Diagnostic info for poor quality images

entity_id.description: Knowledge graph entity ID for primary object
entity_id.title: Entity Id

primary_object_index.description: Index of primary object in detected_objects
primary_object_index.title: Primary Object Index

VisionResult.title: VisionResult

ActivityDiscoveryPhotoEndMessage.title: ActivityDiscoveryPhotoEndMessage
